As a result, Anthropic released Fable 5 with a strict set of guardrails preventing it from answering a range of questions about cybersecurity or biology.

article_items.title: OpenAI introduces free banked reset system for Codex users
article_items.description: OpenAI launches a free banked reset system for Codex users on Plus and Pro plans, letting them save and reuse rate limit resets alongside a referral
article_items.excerpt: OpenAI launches a free banked reset system for Codex users on Plus and Pro plans, letting them save and reuse rate limit resets alongside a referral
article_items.summary: OpenAI has paired the launch with a limited-time referral program. OpenAI has rolled out a “banked reset” system for its Codex coding assistant, giving subscribers the ability to accumulate rate limit resets and deploy them whenever they actually need them. OpenAI launches a free banked reset system for Codex users on Plus and Pro plans, letting them save and reuse rate limit resets alongside a referral OpenAI introduces free banked reset system for Codex users A new rate limit banking feature lets ChatGPT subscribers save and reuse resets on demand, addressing months of user complaints about inflexible timing. When an existing user invites a friend and that friend completes. The feature is free for eligible users on Plus and Pro plans, marking a notable shift from the old model where resets happened on a fixed schedule whether you needed them or not.

OpenAI has rolled out a “banked reset” system for its Codex coding assistant, giving subscribers the ability to accumulate rate limit resets and deploy them whenever they actually need them.
Codex has grown significantly, crossing the 3 million weekly active users milestone and continuing to scale from there.
The feature is free for eligible users on Plus and Pro plans, marking a notable shift from the old model where resets happened on a fixed schedule whether you needed them or not.

OpenAI launches a free banked reset system for Codex users on Plus and Pro plans, letting them save and reuse rate limit resets alongside a referral OpenAI introduces free banked reset system for Codex users A new rate.
When an existing user invites a friend and that friend completes their first Codex interaction, both the referrer and the new user earn an additional reset.
The mechanics are straightforward.
From April through June 2026, user complaints about unpredictable and inflexible reset schedules became increasingly vocal across developer communities.
Users can track their available resets through the profile or usage menu inside the platform.
There is no token, no blockchain integration, and no digital asset play embedded in the banked reset feature.
Each eligible user can refer up to three friends, and the program runs for a two-week window.
OpenAI remains squarely focused on improving the usability of its coding tools.

article_items.title: MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M3 — 427B / 26B active · MOE · 1024K ctx
article_items.description: MiniMax M3 vision-language MoE (427B total / 26B active) for frontier coding, agent toolchains, and 1M-token reasoning via MSA sparse attention. native multimodal (image + video + computer use); BF16 checkpoint with an MXFP8 variant from NVIDIA. Runs on NVIDIA (Hopper/Blackwell) and on AMD CDNA4 (MI350X/MI355X) and CDNA3 (MI300X/MI325X).
